content:
🚀 logo-generator-skill | HTML
🎯 Primary Use Case: Quickly generating professional, high-quality logos and presentation-ready showcase images for startups, developers, designers, and product teams.
✨ Key Features: • SVG Logo Generation (dot matrix, line systems, mixed compositions) • Design Variety (6+ distinct variants per request) • Professional Showcase (12 curated background styles) • Nano Banana Integration (Gemini 3.1 Flash Image Preview) • Interactive HTML Previews
📖 Summary: This repository provides a professional SVG logo generator that creates multiple design variants based on product characteristics. It also generates high-end showcase images with various professional background styles, leveraging Gemini 3.1 Flash Image Preview for refined presentations.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
